form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, 7th of 9 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 15 len behind Welbury with 56.5kg at $5.50. Second-up 6th of 13 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 1 over 1600m, 11 len behind Balzac with 56.5kg at $81. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation second of 12 at this track November 27 over 1600m, a neck behind Director's Cut with 58kg at $2.80. On debut sixth of 9 at Great Yarmouth September 16 over 1600m, 5 len behind Spyce carrying 60.5kg at $15. Shows promise and worth following up.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when ran last of 9 at Haydock Park on September 26 over 1400m, 11 len behind Gaurdman with 60.5kg at $3.80. Improvement likely.

form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, second last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 7 over 1700m, 1.3 len behind Zambezi River with 55.5kg at $2.30. Last start 2nd of 8 at this track on March 21 over 1600m, 14 len behind Wareeth with 60.5kg at $7. Racing well. Rates highly among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at this track on February 4 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Outback Heat with 56kg at $4.50. Last start 3rd in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on February 28 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Captain Fox carrying 60.5kg at $3.80. Worth a market check.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At long odds at debut, second last in a small field at this track on March 5 over 1600m, 8 len behind Billecart carrying 58kg at $29. Last start 5th of 11 at this track on March 19 over 1400m, 14 len behind Infinite Dream carrying 54kg at $67. Happy to risk.
